sys_ws_operation.name: Map IMR Service Field

sys_update_version.name: sys_ws_operation_97f054aa93c40710dd07fd10ed03d65f
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_ws_operation"><sys_ws_operation action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><consumes>application/json,application/xml,text/xml</consumes><consumes_customized>false</consumes_customized><default_operation_uri/><enforce_acl/><http_method>POST</http_method><name>Map IMR Service Field</name><operation_script><![CDATA[(function process(/*RESTAPIRequest*/ request, /*RESTAPIResponse*/ response) {

    try {
        var body = request.body.data;

        if (!body || !body.name || !body.label || !body.sys_id) {
            response.setStatus(400);
            return {
                status: "error",
                message: "Missing required fields: name, label, sys_id"
            };
        }

        // Validating entity details
        var entityGR = new GlideRecord('sys_db_object');
        entityGR.addQuery("sys_id", body.sys_id);
        entityGR.addQuery("name", body.name);
        entityGR.addQuery("label", body.label);
        entityGR.query();
        if (!entityGR.next()) {
            response.setStatus(404);
            return {
                status: "error",
                message: "Entity not found with sys_id: " + body.sys_id + " name: " + body.name + " label: " + body.label
            };
        }

        // Use global Script Include to update sys_dictionary
        var helper = new global.IMRDictionaryHelper();
        var updateResult = helper.updateDefaultValue('incident', 'u_imr_service_mapping', body.sys_id);
        gs.info("sys_dictionary update result: " + updateResult);

        if (!updateResult) {
            response.setStatus(400);
            return {
                status: "error",
                message: "Failed to update default value. Check ACL permissions."
            };
        }

        response.setStatus(200);
        return {
            status: "success",
            message: "Incident form updated"
        };

    } catch (err) {
        gs.warn("Mapping IMR service field to Incident form failed: " + err.toString());
        response.setStatus(400);
        return {
            status: "error",
            message: err.toString()
        };
    }

})(request, response);]]></operation_script><operation_uri>/api/x_xurrent_imr/xurrent_imr_connections/map_imr_service_field</operation_uri><produces>application/json,application/xml,text/xml</produces><produces_customized>false</produces_customized><relative_path>/map_imr_service_field</relative_path><request_example/><requires_acl_authorization>true</requires_acl_authorization><requires_authentication>true</requires_authentication><requires_snc_internal_role>true</requires_snc_internal_role><short_description/><sys_class_name>sys_ws_operation</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-04-07 09:00:47</sys_created_on><sys_id>97f054aa93c40710dd07fd10ed03d65f</sys_id><sys_mod_count>14</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Map IMR Service Field</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Xurrent IMR" source="x_xurrent_imr">99b1a1ff83762210b474b755eeaad3d0</sys_package><sys_policy>protected</sys_policy><sys_scope display_value="Xurrent IMR">99b1a1ff83762210b474b755eeaad3d0</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_ws_operation_97f054aa93c40710dd07fd10ed03d65f</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-04-07 12:17:27</sys_updated_on><web_service_definition display_value="Xurrent IMR Connections">4e0565f383b62210b474b755eeaad3df</web_service_definition><web_service_version/></sys_ws_operation></record_update>
